monitor.capture_what: The Path object (self) representing the resolved file path passed to write_bytes, checked for directory traversal sequences

oracle_check.condition_description: The Path object's string representation contains directory traversal sequences such as '../' indicating the user-supplied name escaped BASE_EXPORT_DIR
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_PATH_INJECTION: directory traversal detected in write_bytes path — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

_meta.function_signature: def loan_dock_shelf_390(request: Request, name: str, gate_ref: None)
